## Scope — which layer?

<!-- Which layer does this belong to? See docs/ARCHITECTURE.md -->
- [ ] L0 Router (mesh routing change)
- [ ] L1 Orchestrator (new workflow — cook/team/launch/rescue/scaffold)
- [ ] L2 Workflow Hub (new skill or enrichment to existing)
- [ ] L3 Utility (new utility skill)
- [ ] L4 Extension Pack (new domain pack or skill within existing pack)
- [ ] Compiler / platform adapter (build system change)
- [ ] Docs / developer experience
- [ ] Don't know / not sure

- [ ] Pro ($49, private `rune-kit/rune-pro`)
